name: jarbobo
description: Interactive graph, sequence and UML class diagrams drawn by LLMs via MCP — with clickable, hoverable elements that link back to source code.

commands.title: Jarbobo: Reopen Closed Tab (diagram or editor)

jarbobo.clearHistoryOnOpen.markdownDescription: Clear the editor history whenever a Jarbobo diagram opens or gains focus. Why: diagram tabs are webviews, which the editor never records in its navigation history — so after clicking a code reference, *Go Back* would jump to a stale pre-diagram location instead of the diagram. Clearing makes *Go Back* simply do nothing in that case. **Trade-off:** the editor only offers an all-or-nothing clear, so this also resets *Go Forward* and the recent-file ordering in Quick Open. Turn this off if you rely heavily on navigation history.
